name: Ash-e Jow (Iranian Barley Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dried green or red lentils
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a pot.
2. Bring to a gentle boil.
3. Simmer for 1 1/4 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve with feta cheese and salad.
Variations: Fry the onions in oil before adding them to the pot. Add 1 cup of cooked chick peas or red kidney beans a few minutes before serving.
